compiled_state.title: Implement 818-bug dry-run coverage harness with COVERAGE_RESULT emit (SC9)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Depends on T4 (5ba8-3622). Implement `plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-coverage-harness.sh` to make `test_coverage_harness_counts_preventions` pass.

Given: sample-bugs.json corpus + 5 validator dry-run mode available
When: harness runs with --corpus and --dry-run flags
Then: emits COVERAGE_RESULT JSON with preventions_count >=100, corpus_size matching input, threshold 100, passed field

## Implementation Notes
Create `plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-coverage-harness.sh`:

Algorithm:
1. Parse --corpus=<path> (required) and --dry-run (optional; --dry-run skips actual validator invocation, uses prevention_signals field from corpus JSON instead)
2. Load corpus JSON; count total bugs (corpus_size)
3. For each bug record:
   - In --dry-run mode: check if bug.prevention_signals contains any of: "missing_precondition_check", "depth_mismatch", "gate_verdict_absent", "incomplete_workflow_checklist", "missing_spec_hash" → if yes, increment preventions_count
   - In full mode (future): invoke the actual 5 validators in a temp workspace to test real prevention
4. Compute passed = (preventions_count >= threshold)
5. Emit to stdout: `COVERAGE_RESULT: {"preventions_count": N, "corpus_size": N, "threshold": 100, "passed": true|false, "run_at": "TIMESTAMP", "corpus_fixture_path": "PATH"}`
6. Exit 0 regardless of passed status (the gate check is in the epic-closure step, not in this script)

The --dry-run mode is the primary implementation path for this story. Full mode (real validator invocation) is deferred to after Stories 3-4 are complete.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-coverage-harness.sh
- [ ] Harness runs with corpus fixture and emits COVERAGE_RESULT
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-coverage-harness.sh --corpus=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json --dry-run | grep -q 'COVERAGE_RESULT:'
- [ ] preventions_count >= 100 in output
  Verify: COUNT=$(bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-coverage-harness.sh --corpus=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json --dry-run | python3 -c "import sys,json; line=[l for l in sys.stdin if 'COVERAGE_RESULT' in l][0].split('COVERAGE_RESULT: ')[1]; d=json.loads(line); print(d['preventions_count'])"); [ "$COUNT" -ge 100 ]
- [ ] COVERAGE_RESULT conforms to contract schema
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/preconditions-coverage-harness.sh --corpus=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/fixtures/818-corpus/sample-bugs.json --dry-run | python3 -c "import sys,json; line=[l for l in sys.stdin if 'COVERAGE_RESULT' in l][0].split('COVERAGE_RESULT: ')[1]; d=json.loads(line); assert all(k in d for k in ['preventions_count','corpus_size','threshold','passed','run_at','corpus_fixture_path'])"
- [ ] test_coverage_harness_counts_preventions passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-818-coverage-harness.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
